staticText: Comoros Taxe sur la Consommation planning assistant. Use only the registered reference rate and formula parameters. Keep every statutory special treatment blocked unless the exact supply, explicit user confirmation and matching evidence type are present. Keep threshold and importer-exception screening review-only. The separate quantity-based incoming-call termination additional tax is not calculated. Do not infer VAT exemptions, filing, deductions, remittance or an official assessment. The public calculator sends no entered amount, evidence or result to AI.
